summary.zh-CN: 变更说明: 新增多存档管理能力，后端补充存档目录、激活接口和存档上下文，前端设置页也加入存档目录面板，便于在不同工作存档之间切换。
summary.en: Change Summary: Added multi-save management with backend save catalog and activation endpoints, save context metadata, and a matching save catalog panel in settings.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

多存档管理能力

  • 变更说明: 新增多存档管理能力，后端补充存档目录、激活接口和存档上下文，前端设置页也加入存档目录面板，便于在不同工作存档之间切换。
  • 影响范围: 影响 save-management 相关功能、savemanagement 相关功能、data-management 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

存档相关服务统一接入 SaveLayoutResolver

  • 变更说明: 存档相关服务统一接入 SaveLayoutResolver，图片、数据服务和迁移流程现在会按当前存档布局解析路径，多存档场景更可靠。
  • 影响范围: 影响 data-services 相关功能、save-layout 相关功能、app-services 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该条目还包含配套的稳定性或清理工作，用来保证可见行为在新流程下保持可靠。

AI Provider 新增自动重试支持和可重试失败分类

  • 变更说明: AI Provider 新增自动重试支持和可重试失败分类，设置页同步完善 Provider Error Retry 配置，异常恢复策略更清晰。
  • 影响范围: 影响 retry 相关功能、settings 相关功能、providers 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

Git 场景新增轻量状态摘要

  • 变更说明: Git 场景新增轻量状态摘要，并在路径展示中补充签名状态；Turbo Engine、DLC 访问状态和共享头像管理也继续完善。
  • 影响范围: 影响 dlc 相关功能、Git 与仓库工具。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过现有的 Git 或仓库相关面板使用该能力，新增行为会直接出现在原有操作入口中。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

迁移操作使用错误存档布局的问题

  • 变更说明: 修复迁移操作使用错误存档布局的问题，降低多存档切换后数据迁移写入错误位置的风险。
  • 影响范围: 影响 migration 相关功能、save-layout 相关功能、data-services 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该条目还包含配套的稳定性或清理工作，用来保证可见行为在新流程下保持可靠。

修正会话生成状态类型处理

  • 变更说明: 修正会话生成状态类型处理，减少对话生成状态显示和流程判断不一致的问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 conversation 相关功能、hero-preset 相关功能、retry 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过现有的 Git 或仓库相关面板使用该能力，新增行为会直接出现在原有操作入口中。
  • 注意事项: 该条目还包含配套的稳定性或清理工作，用来保证可见行为在新流程下保持可靠。

下线旧的数据管理导入/导出入口

  • 变更说明: 下线旧的数据管理导入/导出入口，并保留必要的兼容 DTO，减少设置页和 API 合约中的混乱。
  • 影响范围: 影响 data-management 相关功能、datamanagement 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

统一向外部浏览器交接的向导流程

  • 变更说明: 统一向外部浏览器交接的向导流程，并抑制重复版本解析失败日志，降低运行时噪音。
  • 影响范围: 影响 wizard 相关功能、opencode 相关功能、images-config 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

Multi-save management

  • Change Summary: Added multi-save management with backend save catalog and activation endpoints, save context metadata, and a matching save catalog panel in settings.
  • Impact: Affects Save Management, Savemanagement, Data Management.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Routed save-aware services through SaveLayoutResolver so images

  • Change Summary: Routed save-aware services through SaveLayoutResolver so images, data services, and migration flows resolve paths from the active save layout more reliably.
  • Impact: Affects Data Services, Save Layout, App Services.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: This item also includes supporting stability or cleanup work so the visible behavior stays reliable under the updated flow.

AI provider auto-retry support

  • Change Summary: Added AI provider auto-retry support with retryable failure classifiers, plus updated Provider Error Retry settings for clearer recovery behavior.
  • Impact: Affects Retry, Settings, Providers.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Git

  • Change Summary: Expanded Git, Turbo Engine, DLC, and shared avatar surfaces with lightweight Git status summaries, signature status in path displays, DLC access state handling, and shared avatar management.
  • Impact: Affects Dlc, Git and repository tools.
  • How to Use: Open the Git or repository-related panels you already use; the new capability is surfaced inside those existing actions.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

Migration operations

  • Change Summary: Fixed migration operations to use the correct save layout, reducing the risk of writing migrated data to the wrong location after save changes.
  • Impact: Affects Migration, Save Layout, Hagicode Core.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: This item also includes supporting stability or cleanup work so the visible behavior stays reliable under the updated flow.

Corrected conversation generation state type handling

  • Change Summary: Corrected conversation generation state type handling to keep generation status display and flow decisions consistent.
  • Impact: Affects Conversation, configuration behavior, Hero Preset.
  • How to Use: Open the Git or repository-related panels you already use; the new capability is surfaced inside those existing actions.
  • Notes: This item also includes supporting stability or cleanup work so the visible behavior stays reliable under the updated flow.

The legacy data management import/export flow

  • Change Summary: Removed the legacy data management import/export flow while preserving compatibility DTOs needed by existing clients and contracts.
  • Impact: Affects Data Management, Datamanagement.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Unified wizard handoff through the system browser bridge

  • Change Summary: Unified wizard handoff through the system browser bridge and suppressed repeated version-resolution failure logs to reduce runtime noise.
  • Impact: Affects Wizard, Opencode, Images Config.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.
